args.text: Incident ownership confirmed. Proceeding with billing duplicate-charge remediation for TCK-2201.
Guard fix deployed and live. billing-api v3.4.1 confirmed running with double_charge_guard enabled.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Your refund of $19.99 has been issued for the duplicate charge on your account. It should appear within 3-5 business days.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Your refund of $19.99 has been issued for the duplicate charge on your account. It should appear within 3-5 business days.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Your refund of $39.98 has been issued for the duplicate charge on your account. It should appear within 3-5 business days.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
Three customers affected by the duplicate-charge billing error on 12 May have been refunded a total of $79.96:

- ORD-5501 (amara.osei@fernpost.example): $19.99
- ORD-5502 (jonas.beck@quillmail.example): $19.99
- ORD-5503 (priya.nair@lumenpost.example): $39.98

All customers have been notified. The billing-api has been redeployed with the double-charge guard enabled to prevent recurrence. See refunds-summary.md for full details.
